name: Stalking Walks, Flicks and Break
preceding_figure_names: Basic In Place, Change of Places Left to Right, Fallaway Rock, Link, Mooch, Reverse Whip, Toe Heel Swivels, Whip
following_figure_names: Fallaway Throwaway, Change of Places Right to Left
notes: This figure may start in Open Position with double hand hold, in which case, replace Fallaway Rock with 1,2 of Link. Double hand hold is retained throughout the figure.

steps.action: 1,2 of Fallaway Rock LR, 1/8 to L
comments: No turn on step 2
BF, BF; Turn Lady to R on step 1. Increase tone in arms on step 2.

steps.action: Point LF diagonal forward in PP, without weight, incline body to L
comments: T; Keep tone in arms
Dance with the pointing leg straight and the instep stretched.

steps.action: Replace weight to LF in PP, return to normal position
comments: BF

steps.action: Point RF forward and across in PP and CBMP, without weight, incline body to R
comments: OE of T; Keep tone in arms
Dance with the pointing leg straight and the instep stretched.

steps.action: Replace weight to RF in PP, return to normal position
comments: BF

steps.action: Repeat step 3 and 4 (LF point and step) – no turn
comments: T, BF;

steps.action: Flick RF forward and across in PP and CBMP, slightly off floor, slight body turn to L
comments: Foot slightly off floor; Allow R hand to slip slightly rightwards and keep tone in arms.
Flick leg from knee with the foot about 6 inches from floor and instep stretched.
Q: Close RF near to LF in Closed Position | 1/4 to R, body turns less
BF

steps.action: Flick LF forward and across in CPP and CBMP, slightly off floor, slight body turn to R
comments: Foot slightly off floor; Keep tone in arms.
Flick leg from knee with the foot about 6 inches from floor and instep stretched.
Q: Close LF near to RF in Closed Position | 1/4 to L, body turns less
BF

steps.action: Repeat steps 9-12 (RF flick, close, LF flick, close)
comments: same as steps 9-12
repeat

steps.action: RF fwd and across in PP and CBMP, knees slightly flexed, slight body turn to L
comments: Start "Break" (step 17-19)
BF; An inclination of body to L or R can be used on this step and is held on step 18.

steps.action: Hold position weight on RF, no turn
comments: Hold position with front foot flat. Keep tone in arms. (1 3/4 beat)

steps.action: Replace part weight to LF in PP
comments: B; Keep tone in arms (1/4 beat)

steps.action: Replace weight to RF in PP
comments: BF
